title: chamaecrista anfracta
intro: Chamaecrista anfracta, also known as the small sensitive plant, is a tropical flowering plant belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). Chamaecrista anfracta has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and glycosides. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and treating skin infections. Chamaecrista anfracta can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
